core_modules.description: Top-level Python API surface aggregating modeling, execution, geometry/material/tally definitions, and results access.
High-level composition/driver object for OpenMC inputs and execution orchestration.
Execution wrappers for launching OpenMC workflows from Python with low coupling to internals.
Post-processing interface for statepoint output data (k-effective, tallies, metadata).
ctypes/C-API bridge for in-memory OpenMC engine control; powerful but tighter runtime constraints.
Depletion coupling operator binding transport solves with nuclide depletion chains.

cli_commands.name: openmc
cli_commands.description: Primary executable invoked by Python wrappers; supports run, plot, and volume calculation modes.
